ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the player participates in */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team participates in */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is played */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being rated */,
  "fantasy_points" INTEGER /* Fantasy points earned by the player */,
  "user_rating" REAL /* Average user rating for the player */,
  "our_rating" INTEGER /* The company's own rating for the player */,
  "your_rating" INTEGER /* User's personal rating for the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the rating is for */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_ratings_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_ratings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., 2-1, 0-0) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the match */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_player_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the rating */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user with the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_player_ratings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_player_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected date the player will return from the injury */,
  "actual_return_date" TEXT /* Actual date the player returned from the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was transferred */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date the transfer occurred */,
  "new_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new team the player joined */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee paid for the player */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., permanent, loan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_new_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the article is about */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Text of the article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who achieved */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "achievement_date" TEXT /* Date the achievement occurred */,
  "achievement_description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who has the skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "skill_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_skills_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
